other_observers: Found by Joey Kellner. Seen with Joey, Chris Wood, Brandon Percival, Joe Roller, Lisa Edwards, Bill Maynard, Glenn Walbek, and Norm Erthal.;
description: A large, pale loon. Bill large, yellowish, upswept, habitually held above horizontal. Head blocky, with knob above eye. Overall head color pale grayish-yellow brown, with slightly darker auricular patch, crown, and forhead. Cheeks, throat, and breast paler, almost white. The back of the bird was a bit darker and very scaly looking due to prominent pale edging on the back feathers. Seen right next to a Common Loon the bird was distinctly larger.Behaviors: Swimming, loafing, preening periods alternating with long feeding dives.Call: Soft hooting vocalization heard when bird was swimming with Common Loon.Plumage: Juvenile
